title: Prudence's alibi - cataloguing with Evelyn until 3 a.m.
text: Night -2: reconstructing both sides of the Theodora-Jonah correspondence with Evelyn Croft, until three in the morning. Verify with the florist. Bring context; she is armed with shears.

verifyRoutes.hint: The florist can confirm it - two rival family lines, one long night of letters.
